# slide-spec

slide-spec is a YAML-first static presentation tool.

## Primary entrypoints

- /quickstart
- /schema/
- /templates/
- /cli/
- /examples/

## Product model

- `site.yaml` defines global branding, labels, and shared links.
- `presentations/index.yaml` defines the published archive list.
- `presentation.yaml` defines authored slide structure and template content.
- `generated.yaml` defines structured metrics, releases, contributors, and merged pull requests.

## Current templates

- hero
- agenda
- section-list-grid
- timeline
- progress-timeline
- people
- metrics-and-links
- action-cards
- closing

## High-value docs pages

- /schema/site
- /schema/presentations-index
- /schema/presentation
- /schema/generated
- /templates/hero
- /templates/timeline
- /templates/metrics-and-links
- /examples/tutorial-example
- /connectors/github

## Important constraints

- The current schema is exact; required fields and omission rules are documented in the schema pages.
- Generated data can be authored manually or fetched from GitHub.
- GitHub is the only built-in data source today.
- The docs examples are based on a validated reference fixture project.
